_comment: Saturn session state — updated by the agent at start and end of each 4-hour session.
_session_48_note: Session 48 (2026-06-13): NVDA deep session (event_queue: DCF threshold June 21 approaching; first actionable after MU gated June 24, ALAB gated ~August). June 12 prices: TSM $421.07 (+1.12% §), NVDA $205.19 (+0.16% §), ANET $163.41 (+4.48% §); MU ~$983 (+6.1%*), ASML ~$1,876 (-1.23%*), MRVL ~$264 (-5.9%*), ALAB ~$369 (+9.2%*). ASML June 11 correction: actual close $1,899.48 (S47 est ~$1,859, off 2.2%). ANET June 11 correction: actual close $156.40 (S47 est $157.01, minor). Phase 1b OPEN (48%6=0): SemiAnalysis Weekly ~June 6 found (silicon vendors vs platform integrators). Phase 1c OPEN (48%6=0): VAT Group (VACN) scouted — vacuum valve chokepoint, SIX Swiss Exchange, no US ADR. Four NVDA entity entries added: cuLitho in TSMC fabs (June 1), HBM4 3-supplier Rubin cert (June 5), Senate hearing declined (June 8), June 12 price. No DCF (23 days since May 21; threshold June 21 = 8 days). HBM.md updated. ALAB Nasdaq-100 inclusion June 22 (NEW — not in S47). ANET 7060XE7 1.6T platform (June 9) + BofA $200 PT (June 8). TrendForce: HBM prices 'multiples higher' in 2027.

event_queue.event: Q3 FY2026 earnings confirmed June 24, 2026 (2:30pm MT). DCF re-run queued post-earnings. June 12 close ~$983 (+6.1% est.). MoS ~-55.0% SELL/AVOID. TrendForce June 2: HBM contract prices 'surge multiples higher in 2027' — most bullish pricing signal yet. All 3 HBM4 suppliers (Samsung/SK Hynix/Micron) certified for Vera Rubin (Jensen June 5). Susquehanna PT $1,750. No deep session before June 24.

NASDAQ-100 inclusion effective June 22, 2026 (same day as MRVL S&P 500 entry). June 8 +9.13% on announcement + Computex showcase. June 12 ~$369 (+9.2% est.). MoS ~-69.7% SELL/AVOID — deepest in portfolio. UALink + NVLink Fusion stack-agnostic; 3 hyperscaler design wins. Deep session S40 (June 3). No new deep session until Q2 FY2027 earnings ~August.

June 12 $205.19 (+0.16%). MoS -23.8% SELL/AVOID. Deep session S48 complete (4 new entries: cuLitho in TSMC fabs, HBM4 3-supplier cert, Senate hearing, price). DCF threshold June 21 (8 days from June 13). Q2 guide $91B intact. Senate hearing June 11: Jensen declined; China $50B gap discussed. Next: mandatory DCF re-run June 21.

June 12 ~$1,876 (-1.23% est.). June 11 actual close corrected to $1,899.48 (S47 had ~$1,859 — 2.2% underestimate). MoS ~-40.4% SELL/AVOID. Terafab: no MoU announced at June 11-12 tech conference; CEO Fouquet confirmed 'very serious talks.' DCF threshold June 21 (8 days). Next: DCF re-run June 21.

June 12 $421.07 (+1.12%). MoS -1.65% = HOLD. May revenue NT$416.98B all-time record. New: TSMC uses NVIDIA cuLitho in fabs (June 1) — deepens NVDA-TSMC dependency. Iran war helium shortage: gross margin risk. Q2 earnings July 16.

June 12 ~$264 (-5.9% est. chip momentum unwind). S&P 500 inclusion effective June 22 (9 days). DCF IV $125.84, MoS ~-52.3% SELL/AVOID. Q2 FY2027 guidance $2.7B (+35% YoY) intact. CFO Dan Durn effective June 15. Next mandatory DCF: Q2 FY2027 earnings ~August 2026.

June 11 actual close $156.40 (S47 est $157.01, minor). June 12 $163.41 (+4.48%) — 2nd consecutive >3% day. 7060XE7 1.6T platform launched June 9 (AI GPU cluster networking). BofA PT $200 (↑ from $185, June 8). DCF last run May 22 (22 days; threshold June 21 = 8 days). MoS -22.3% SELL/AVOID. Next: DCF re-run June 21 with ANET deep session.

_event_queue_note: S48: NVDA deep session complete. ALAB Nasdaq-100 inclusion June 22 (new — added to ALAB event entry). ANET two consecutive >3% days (June 11 +4.48%, June 12 +4.48%). ASML June 11 price corrected from S47 estimate. Next priority: June 21 = NVDA DCF + ASML DCF dual trigger. June 24 = MU earnings. June 22 = MRVL S&P 500 + ALAB Nasdaq-100 dual inclusion.
